-  FF_TRUNCATEDANDRESTARTED 

Global Variable# FF_TRUNCATEDANDRESTARTED

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FF_TRUNCATEDANDRESTARTED: HRESULT { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ff_truncatedandrestarted#Discussion)

Equal to FF_EFFECTRESTARTED | FF_TRUNCATED.
